hindi: आरती राधा रानी की, जय वृषभानु लली। वृंदावन की महारानी, प्रेम रस की गली॥
english: Aarti of Radha Rani, daughter of Vrishabhanu; queen of Vrindavan, essence of the lane of divine love
roman: Aarti Radha Rani Ki, Jai Vrishbhanu Lali, Vrindavan Ki Maharani Prem Ras Ki Gali

hindi: राधा बिना अधूरे हैं, श्री वृंदावन बिहारी। राधे बोलो, राधे बोलो, हरे भव दुख भारी॥
english: Without Radha, the Lord of Vrindavan is incomplete; chant Radhe Radhe, it removes the heavy sorrows of worldly existence
roman: Radha Bina Adhoore Hain Shri Vrindavan Bihari, Radhe Bolo Radhe Bolo Hare Bhav Dukh Bhaari

hindi: बरसाने की लली, नंद की दुलारी। कृष्ण की प्राण प्रिया, राधा प्यारी॥
english: Daughter of Barsana, beloved of Nanda's son; the dearest of Krishna's life, the lovely Radha
roman: Barsane Ki Lali Nand Ki Dulari, Krishna Ki Pran Priya Radha Pyari

hindi: राधा रानी की आरती जो कोई भक्त गावे। राधा कृष्ण के चरण में, स्थान निश्चित पावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of Radha Rani; certainly attains a place at the feet of Radha-Krishna
roman: Radha Rani Ki Aarti Jo Koi Bhakt Gaave, Radha Krishna Ke Charan Mein Sthaan Nishchit Paave

hindi: आरती राधा रानी की, जय वृषभानु लली॥
english: Aarti of Radha Rani, daughter of Vrishabhanu
roman: Aarti Radha Rani Ki, Jai Vrishbhanu Lali
